mapper.sql: u.id AS creator_id, u.nickname, u.avatar, cp.intro, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM consult_order co WHERE co.creator_id = u.id AND co.status = 'COMPLETED' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM refund_apply ra WHERE ra.order_id = co.id ) ) AS consult_count, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM audio_info ai WHERE ai.creator_id = u.id AND ai.audit_status = 1 AND ai.is_deleted = 0 ) AS audio_count, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_follow uf2 WHERE uf2.creator_id = u.id ) AS fans_count, ( SELECT MIN(cs.price) FROM consult_slot cs WHERE cs.creator_id = u.id AND cs.status = 'AVAILABLE' ) AS min_price
mapper.select:
SELECT , EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM user_follow uf WHERE uf.user_id = #{userId} AND uf.creator_id = u.id ) AS is_following FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN creator_profile cp ON u.id = cp.user_id WHERE u.is_creator = 1 AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM creator_apply ca WHERE ca.user_id = u.id AND ca.status = 'APPROVED' )
AND (u.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') OR cp.intro LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY consult_count DESC
